May 19, 2025

# Video: Judith Butler on Destroyed Protections for Extra-Mural Speech

Share

Click above to share

Video is now available for Judith Butler’s keynote address for 3CT’s twentieth anniversary conference, [Theory Now: Practices, Predicaments, and Possibilities](https://ccct.uchicago.edu/events/theory-now/) . Butler examined how ‘fascist passions’ in the United States destroy extra-mural protections that belong to academic freedom.
